name: @microsoft/mxc-sdk-darwin-x64
description: MXC SDK native binaries for darwin-x64 (x86_64-apple-darwin).

scripts.prepack: node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('mxc-exec-mac')){console.error('prepack: mxc-exec-mac not staged; refusing to pack an empty platform package');process.exit(1)}"

author: Microsoft Corporation
